hooks.command: npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1

python3 -c 'import re, sys; data=sys.stdin.read(); pattern=r"rm\\s+-rf|git\\s+push\\s+--force|git\\s+reset\\s+--hard|DROP\\s+TABLE"; blocked=re.search(pattern, data, re.I); print("BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.", file=sys.stderr) if blocked else None; sys.exit(1 if blocked else 0)'
